title: Paul Stamets on Nature, Mushrooms, and Creativity
content:
In this Earth Day edition of Specialized’s Levolution, Paul Stamets explores how solutions to the challenges we face can be found in nature. Through mushrooms, mycelium, movement, and the creativity unlocked by riding bikes, he points to a deeper intelligence woven through the living world.

From deep forest rides to paradigm-shifting ideas, Stamets reflects on how movement sparks non-linear thinking, how mycelial networks mirror human communities, and why nature remains one of our greatest teachers.

Other reading recommendations: Entangled Life

The post Paul Stamets on Nature, Mushrooms, and Creativity appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
